articles.title: Eddie Murphy receives life achievement award by AFI, drawing standing ovation at star-filled tribute - AP News
articles.description: Eddie Murphy has received the American Film Institute's life achievement award at a star-studded ceremony. The event, held Saturday night at the Dolby Theatre, featured appearances from Spike Lee, Martin Lawrence, Dave Chappelle, and more. Murphy, known for h…
articles.content: LOS ANGELES (AP) Eddie Murphy took a moment to look out at the star-studded room at the American Film Institute ceremony at his family, his peers, the people who have shared his journey and let it al… [+4157 chars]

articles.author: Rachel Chason
articles.title: In Angola, love for an American pope but not for an American president - The Washington Post
articles.description: In Luanda, Catholics expressed love and admiration for Pope Leo XIV, the first American pope, but not so much for President Trump because of the war in Iran.
articles.content: LUANDA, Angola Josephine García and her friends had been standing under a sweltering sun for hours, dancing in the airport parking lot as they waited for a glimpse of Pope Leo XIV. The first American… [+125 chars]
